description: Zero-addon MCP server for Godot 4: agents edit, run, and play-test the game.
name: io.github.Erodenn/godot-mcp-runtime

environmentVariables.description: Path to the Godot 4.x executable. Auto-detected if Godot is on PATH.
environmentVariables.name: GODOT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Enable verbose logging when set to 'true'.
environmentVariables.name: DEBUG

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to disable run_project/run_script confirmation prompts (fail-open) for clients that cannot display elicitation, e.g. Claude Desktop. Tier 1 security hard-blocks still apply.
environmentVariables.name: GODOT_MCP_DISABLE_ELICITATION

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to hard-reject anything that would otherwise prompt, for unattended operation. Takes precedence over GODOT_MCP_DISABLE_ELICITATION.
environmentVariables.name: GODOT_MCP_STRICT

title: Godot MCP Runtime
